meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any destructive or broad database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity or incomplete result context must remain outside confirmed histories. Current-event Numata rows are event results, not prior histories for the same event-relative view.

primarySourcesChecked: HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press A/B/C result速報 PDF
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF
Web search for HPA/JPA/Goodlift-indexable exact-name matches
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open PRs were found before this batch. Recent merged work included Lot 26-30, so this batch continues with Lot 31-35 and avoids duplicate work. This batch adds an isolated research log only and does not touch app layout, runtime logic, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json.
